Documentation.short_help: Aggregate points from a trajectory online
Documentation.long_help: Aggregate points from a trajectory into a voxel grid with play mode

Property.name: Clear point cloud
Property.Documentation: Clear the point cloud. Parameter changes must be applied before clearing.

Property.name: Free Unused Memory
Property.Documentation: Free the excess memory allocated to the voxel grid.

IntVectorProperty.name: Display Output
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Indicates whether or not to display the filter output.
